vip.heading: Get the Vue Chain for $19.98 with your first box.
vip.body: VIP members unlock exclusive pricing on individual pieces, a monthly credit worth up to $80, and early access to new drops. The Vue Chain was featured in a recent Haze Box.

editorial.heading: The chain that starts every stack.
editorial.body: We designed the Vue Chain to be the piece you never take off: thin enough to sit flush against skin, substantial enough to catch light on its own.

closingCta.heading: Still deciding? Join 12,000+ members who get pieces like this monthly.
closingCta.body: VIP members save up to 58 percent on individual pieces, get free express shipping, and receive a curated monthly edit delivered to their door.

gallery.imageAlt: Vue Chain styled on a model

reviews.name: Sophia L.
reviews.title: My everyday necklace now
reviews.body: I wear this every single day. It layers beautifully with longer chains and sits perfectly at the collarbone.

reviews.name: Ava M.
reviews.title: Better than the photos
reviews.body: The gold is gorgeous in person and still looks brand new after weeks of wear.

reviews.name: Elena K.
reviews.title: Beautiful but runs slightly long
reviews.body: Gorgeous piece and incredible quality for the price. I would recommend 14 inches if you want a true choker fit.

faqs.question: Will this necklace tarnish or turn my skin green?
faqs.answer: No. The Vue Chain is made from 14k gold-fill, which is far thicker than standard plating and backed by a 12-month warranty.

faqs.question: What length should I choose?
faqs.answer: 16 inches is the bestseller and rests right at the collarbone. Go shorter for a choker fit and longer for layering.

faqs.question: How does VIP membership work with this product?
faqs.answer: VIP members receive exclusive pricing on individual pieces like the Vue Chain plus monthly credits redeemable toward products or boxes.

faqs.question: What if it breaks or I am not happy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day return window for store credit and a 12-month manufacturing warranty.
